positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a whimsical, floating jungle scene at dawn. The composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring thick tropical leaves (banana, monstera, fern) framing a cluster of diverse, fantastical hummingbirds in flight. The style is bold, graphic, and inspired by vintage mid-century screen prints mixed with modern neo-tribal art. Strong contrast is achieved using jewel tones (deep emerald, sapphire blue, ruby red) contrasted against a creamy, off-white background. The silhouettes of the birds and leaves should be sharp and defined, with clean vector lines. Dramatic backlighting creates strong, graphic halos around the foliage. Minimalist composition, suitable for repeating textile patterns, maximal visual impact.
negative: blur, noisy, low resolution, grainy, watermark, text, signature, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, ugly, deformed, washed out, pastel, realistic photo, jpeg artifacts, monochrome, grayscale, gradient
